pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 10,14 and export_result.sh line 8 - path consistently used and validated
setup_task.sh lines 11,15 and export_result.sh line 9 - path consistently used and validated

DICOM analysis: Downloaded actual data from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip. DICOM dimensions: 512x512 pixels with 0.4785 mm/pixel spacing = 245 mm (X,Y), 108 slices × 2 mm = 216 mm (Z)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real DICOM data (CT 0051 - InVesalius Sample) from the official InVesalius 3 v3.0 GitHub release. The task requires placing 3 fiducial markers at least 20mm apart on a CT cranium scan. Output paths are /home/ga/Documents/fiducial_report.txt and /home/ga/Documents/neuronavigation_plan.inv3. However, the volume_bounds_mm metadata claim of [500, 500, 200] is incorrect; the actual CT volume dimensions are approximately [245, 245, 216] mm based on DICOM pixel spacing (0.4785 mm/pixel, 512x512 pixels) and slice thickness (2 mm, 108 slices).
